summary: Test suite has critical deficiencies. Main policy logic (max-age, keep-latest, max-total-size) is partially tested, but fixture files (tests/fixtures/basic.tsv, tests/fixtures/multi.tsv) are referenced but not provided, making tests non-executable. Input validation testing is sparse (only --max-age-days invalid input tested; missing --now, --max-total-size, --keep-latest invalid inputs, missing --input flag, empty files, malformed TSV). Tests use only substring matching, never validating exact output format, reason fields, or calculations. No edge cases (boundary dates, zero values, ties, large sizes). No dynamic fixture creation or documentation of expected fixture content. Bats tests violate ACT requirement (run locally, not through workflow). The run-act-tests.sh partially addresses ACT testing but uses hardcoded fixtures. Would catch basic happy-path regressions in policies, but miss error handling, validation, and boundary conditions.
